completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for knowledge stats empty-store 500. No source or parent certification fields modified.

Root-cause fix implemented in internal/knowledge/store.go: outer COALESCE handles an empty knowledge_concepts scalar subquery as an explicit empty prompt_contract_version, and lint stats only tolerate pgx.ErrNoRows. Added tests/integration/knowledge_stats_test.go adversarial empty-store regression and updated tests/e2e/knowledge_store_test.go to assert the empty-store HTTP 200 plus stats response contract. Targeted Go unit and focused E2E passed; the new integration regression passed inside a broader integration run with unrelated NATS/Drive failures.

Regression evidence recorded for the bugfix: focused E2E red/green proof, targeted Go unit proof, live PostgreSQL empty-store integration proof, broad-order stats pass inside the implementation-stage E2E run, and c6d2b26 broad E2E green baseline used during validation closeout.

Validated BUG-025-001 closure from existing focused red/green evidence and the later c6d2b26 full E2E baseline: empty-store stats return HTTP 200 with zero/default content, prompt_contract_version is explicit empty string, and the broad suite no longer reports the empty-store stats 500.
Audited packet consistency: bug.md, scopes.md, uservalidation.md, report.md, and state.json agree on Fixed/Verified/Closed status with edits confined to the BUG-025-001 packet.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered knowledge stats blocker. No prior bug folder existed under specs/025-knowledge-synthesis-layer.

Implemented the empty-store stats fix and regression coverage. Focused red reproduced HTTP 500, focused green E2E passed, Go unit passed, and the empty-store integration regression passed; broader integration and E2E runs failed on unrelated sibling issues at that time.
Validated closure from existing focused BUG-025-001 evidence and the c6d2b26 full E2E green baseline.
Audited packet closeout fields and report evidence formatting before final artifact lint. Edits remained confined to the BUG-025-001 packet.

failures.summary: Knowledge stats returned 500 on empty store before the bug fix.
BUG-025-001 stats assertion passed in broad order; that broad command exited 1 from unrelated DomainExtraction, KnowledgeSynthesis external URL, and RecommendationProviders status failures.
